title: My AI
description: Create and manage your personalized AI assistants

wizard.stepModelDesc: Select a base model for your AI assistant
wizard.stepKnowledgeDesc: Upload documents to teach your AI assistant domain knowledge
wizard.stepPersonalityDesc: Define the character and communication style of your AI
wizard.stepFinishDesc: Name your AI assistant and confirm the settings
wizard.uploadText: Drag files here, or click to browse
wizard.promptPlaceholder: Describe your AI assistant's personality and behavior...
wizard.namePlaceholder: Give your AI assistant a name

personality.title: What should your assistant be like?
personality.subtitle: Choose a personality template or describe in your own words

identity.title: Give it a name and look
identity.subtitle: Make your assistant unique
identity.greetingPlaceholder: What should your assistant say when it first meets you...

knowledge.skipNotice: This step is optional. You can add knowledge anytime in assistant settings.

versions.title: Version History
versions.description: View model versions, roll back to a previous version, and compare metrics.
versions.selectTwo: Select two versions to compare metrics (calls the Eval API).

graph.modeWorkbenchBody: The main tree, lateral links, and node detail stay legible so you can rewire the graph precisely.
graph.modeOrbitBody: Branch spacing and depth cues are amplified here so hotspots and cross-domain connections surface faster.
graph.noAttachableFiles: No knowledge files available to attach.
graph.noChildren: This node has no children yet.
graph.selectionParentDescription: The graph is now in selection mode. Click the assistant center to move this memory to top level, or click another node to make it the primary parent.
graph.selectionChildrenDescription: The graph is dimmed. Click nodes to batch-assign them as children of the current memory, then apply once.
graph.selectionRelatedDescription: Click nodes to pin manual lateral relations. The system will still maintain additional semantic cross-branch links.
graph.selectionParentEmpty: This memory will stay at the top level under the assistant.
graph.noSystemConnections: The system has not found a strong cross-branch relation yet.
graph.connectionHint: Shift-drag rebinds parent, Alt-drag creates a lateral link
graph.connectionHintVisual: Start a selection mode here, then click directly on nodes in the graph.
graph.parentHint: Parent-child links shape the tree and branch recall; manual links only express lateral relations.
graph.parentHintVisual: The main tree stays single-parent. Strong cross-branch relationships are expressed through lateral links.
graph.relatedAutoHint: The system automatically maintains cross-branch semantic links. Manually pinned links will not be overridden.

model.syntheticLlmHelper: Images, captured frames, and video files go directly to {model}
model.visionCoveredByLlm: Image input will be handled directly by {model}
model.audioInputCoveredByLlm: Voice input will be handled directly by {model}
model.audioOutputCoveredByLlm: Voice output will be generated directly by {model}
model.realtimeSelected: Full-duplex realtime voice currently runs on {model}
model.realtimeAsrSelected: Synthetic realtime speech recognition currently uses {model}
model.realtimeTtsSelected: Synthetic realtime speech synthesis currently uses {model}
model.realtimeCoveredByLlm: Full-duplex realtime voice will run directly on {model}
model.realtimeFallback: Realtime voice currently uses the system model {model}

mode.standardDesc: Turn-based chat with typing, click-to-dictate input, and per-message read aloud.
mode.omniDesc: Uses a dedicated realtime model for live voice and multimodal interaction.
mode.syntheticDesc: Realtime ASR + vision-capable LLM + realtime TTS, with user barge-in.
mode.syntheticRequiresVision: {model} does not currently support visual input, so it cannot drive synthetic realtime.
mode.syntheticSupportsVideo: {model} currently supports image and video-file input.
mode.syntheticImageOnly: {model} currently supports images and captured frames.

profile.modelSyncFailed: The model changed, but assistant metadata sync failed. The page has been reloaded to the real saved state.
profile.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this assistant? This action cannot be undone.
profile.deleteCardConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

canvas.noDatasets: No knowledge bases yet. Click Manage to add.
